theme_strategy.description: A clean, distraction-free environment that mimics the feeling of premium paper and fresh ink. Avoids the 'cold tech' look of standard AI tools.

editor.usage: The main document editor (for reading/writing comfort)

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-6 py-3 bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: rounded-full px-4 py-2 hover:bg-muted text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors

cards.style: bg-card border border-border/40 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 rounded-xl overflow-hidden

inputs.style: rounded-lg border-border bg-background px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all duration-200 outline-none placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

chat_interface.bubble_user: bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-6 py-4 max-w-[80%]
chat_interface.bubble_ai: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-6 py-4 max-w-[80%] shadow-sm
chat_interface.container: flex flex-col gap-4 p-4 md:p-6 h-full overflow-y-auto

universal_guidelines.do_not_use_gradients: Avoid full-screen gradients. Use solid, warm neutrals.
universal_guidelines.typography_first: Design is 80% typography. Ensure line-height is generous (1.6 to 1.8 for body text).
universal_guidelines.shadows: Use soft, diffuse shadows (shadow-sm, shadow-md). Avoid harsh black shadows.
universal_guidelines.borders: Use subtle borders (border-stone-200). Avoid heavy black borders.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Playfair Display' from Google Fonts for all headings.
Use 'Inter' for UI text and 'Merriweather' for the document editor content.
Ensure the 'Nyxen' avatar is always visible in the chat interface.
Implement a 'Zen Mode' in the document editor that hides the sidebar.
Use the provided image URLs for the story templates.
Make sure the TTS voice visualization (waveform) is prominent when Nyxen is speaking.
